Research

African questions,
global answers.

TRI AI Research drives initiatives that address African challenges while contributing to the global AI ecosystem — building datasets, tools, and methods that move the field forward.

01 — Initiatives

What we're working on.

Sauti Project

Building speech and language resources for under-resourced African languages.

Read more →

ChowNet

Computer-vision datasets and models for African food.

Read more →

02 — Publications

Recent papers.

  • Feb 2026 Towards Speech Recognition for Under-Resourced African Languages: A Sauti Project Benchmark →
  • Nov 2025 ChowNet: A Diverse Image Dataset for African Cuisine Recognition →
